subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! Praise be to God that in Adhirbayjan thou didst kindle a fire in the hearts of the heedless ones, and in that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده دیرین جمال ابهی الحمد لله در آذربایجان آذری بجان غافلان زدی و در آن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
